name.ja: <ruby>海竜神の大渦<rt>ダイダロス・メイルストローム</rt></ruby>

text.en: When your opponent would Normal or Special Summon a monster(s) while you control "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon": Negate the Summon, and if you do, destroy that monster(s), then if you control a WATER Link Monster, you can destroy all non-WATER monsters on the field. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use 1 "Daedalus Maelstrom" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②效果1回合1次，仅可使用其中1个。①：自己场上存在“龙都 亚特兰蒂斯”，且对手召唤・特殊召唤怪兽之际可以发动。将其无效，将该怪兽破坏。然后，自己场上存在水属性连接怪兽的情况下，可将除水属性怪兽以外的、场上的怪兽全部破坏。②：将墓地的此卡除外，将自己场上的1张表侧表示的“海”送至墓地，以对手场上的1只怪兽为对象可以发动。将该怪兽送至墓地。

series: Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon
